description: The atmospheric chemistry component of MRI-ESM3.4 (Deushi et al., 2026) uses the MRI Chemistry Climate Model version 3.2 (MRI-CCM3.2), which simulates ozone and other trace gases in the troposphere and middle atmosphere. MRI-CCM3.2 is an updated version of MRI-CCM2.1, compared with MRI-ESM2.0 (Yukimoto et al., 2019). In the simulations, meteorological fields and aerosol surface area density are provided to MRI-CCM3.2 from the interactively coupled atmosphere component MRI-AGCM4.4 and aerosol component MASINGAR mk-3r2, respectively. In turn, ozone and methane concentrations are supplied to MRI-AGCM4.4, while concentrations of HOₓ and Oₓ species are supplied to MASINGAR mk-3r2.
